creator: rnsanchez@wait4.org
text:
Hello Pav,

On Sat, 19 Dec 2009 18:06:34 +0100
Pav Lucistnik <pav@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Is this still a problem with nvidia-driver-195.22? Also, what you ment
> with that WITH_GCC3 remark?

I don't have that machine anymore, so this could be invalidated/marked
as obsolete by now.  IIRC, the remark was that GCC4 was somehow assumed
and the build would fail.  But this could now be bogus as well, so
better dump it away.

Regards.

-- 
Ricardo Nabinger Sanchez           http://rnsanchez.wait4.org/
  "Left to themselves, things tend to go from bad to worse."
